allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) for line in lines[-30:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('role', ''\) content = obj.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'[{role}]: {c[\\"text\\"][:300]}'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'[{role}]: {content[:300]}'\) except: pass ")
